name: Dawnmeadow
personality: Equal parts pointy-hatted and formidable, this capybara's swirling spiral eyes ensure it sees the entire codebase as a single coherent thought. Downside: Dawnmeadow finds unpredictability physically uncomfortable. Upside: whatever you're using, it will work alongside it without complaint.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
